summary: Anti-Copy/Media-Protection Initiative - 3 Layers Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed. All 8 frontend route tests passed. Layer 1 (Entitlement Gating): download-token endpoint correctly enforces ownership checks, returns 401 for unauthenticated, 404 for non-existent assets, admin bypass works. Layer 2 (Telemetry/Abuse Detection): admin endpoints return proper data with ip, user_agent, action, timestamp fields; non-admin gets 403. Layer 3 (Forensic Watermarking): verified UID:user|AID:asset|DL:event|TS:time embedded in image PNG metadata, video ffmpeg metadata, and audio ffmpeg metadata.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anti-Copy/Media-Protection 3 Layers fully tested. Layer 1 (Entitlement Gating): _check_entitlement() verifies admin bypass, job ownership (viral_jobs.user_id == user.id), and lock status. Rate limit: 30 download tokens per user per hour. Layer 2 (Telemetry): media_access_log collection stores IP, user_agent, action, timestamp, extras. Admin endpoints at /api/media/admin/telemetry-summary, /api/media/admin/access-log, /api/media/admin/abuse-flags. Layer 3 (Forensic Watermarking): _forensic_watermark_image/video/audio functions embed 'UID:{user_id}|AID:{asset_id}|DL:{download_event_id}|TS:{timestamp}' in file metadata. For images: PNG metadata Description/Comment fields. For video/audio: ffmpeg metadata comment field. Forensic downloads logged with forensic_id and watermark_type fields.

layer1_entitlement_gating.rate_limit: 30 download tokens per user per hour

frontend_content_protection.secure_url_usage: All file assets use /api/media/stream/ URLs, no raw static URLs in DOM
